features.name: parameter_identifier_to_cell_parameter
features.description: Code should include a cell instantiation where a module parameter identifier is used to initialize a cell's parameter value

features.name: module_parameter_declaration
features.description: Code should include a module with a parameter declaration used as a constant value

features.name: parameterized_cell_instantiation
features.description: Code should include a cell instantiation with parameter override using an identifier
